overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a witch character exploring a gothic magical castle campus. The character ascends outdoor stone stairs, traverses covered cloister walkways, crosses a cobblestone courtyard, and enters grand interior halls with ornate staircases. The environment features medieval stone architecture, overcast lighting, and other robed students walking about.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wide stone staircase along a castle rampart, flanked by a stone wall on the right and ornate railing on the left. The overcast sky provides diffused lighting as the character approaches a lit lamp post at the top of the stairs.

events.description: enters covered stone cloister from open terrace

agents.ego_description: walking through covered cloister corridor with gothic arches

dark wooden beam ceiling overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered cloister walkway with gothic stone arches and a wooden ceiling. Through the arches on the left, the courtyard and cathedral facade become visible. A student in robes walks past in the opposite direction.

segments.scene_description: Exiting the cloister, the character enters a wide cobblestone courtyard with the massive gothic cathedral facade ahead. The character crosses the open plaza, passing other robed students, and approaches the main entrance stairs.

begins ascending grand staircase to upper level

agents.ego_description: entering grand hall and walking toward central staircase

segments.scene_description: The character enters the castle through massive wooden doors into a grand hall with a symmetrical double staircase. Warm torchlight illuminates the marble floors and ornate emblem on the far wall. The character begins ascending the stairs as other students walk nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper level corridor with statues and tapestries

entered.detail: narrow hallway with vaulted stone ceiling
large carved wooden door with metal hinges

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the grand stairs, the character enters an upper corridor with vaulted ceilings and wall tapestries. The character passes through a heavy wooden door and approaches a large guardian statue at the end of the hallway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the overcast outdoor ramparts of a gothic castle into the warm, ornate grandeur of its interior halls. It begins by ascending a wide stone staircase along a rampart under a diffused sky, moving toward a lit lamp post before transitioning into a covered cloister walkway defined by gothic arches and wooden ceilings. As the camera exits the cloister, the scene opens into a wide cobblestone courtyard where the character crosses an open plaza toward a massive cathedral facade. The movement then flows through heavy wooden doors into a grand hall, where the lighting shifts from gray to warm torchlight reflecting off marble floors and a symmetrical double staircase. Finally, the camera ascends these stairs and enters an upper corridor of vaulted ceilings and tapestries, moving past a heavy door toward a large guardian statue.
